title: Pay-to-Multisig (P2MS)
description: Legacy bare multisig output template that places multiple public keys and an m-of-n threshold directly in the locking script. It spends through OP_CHECKMULTISIG and predates the more flexible P2SH-based multisig pattern.

resources.title: P2MS - Pay To Multisig
resources.notes: Decoding walkthrough for the bare multisig locking script, unlocking script, and legacy spending flow.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Canonical multisig script reference covering the m-of-n template and how it differs from P2SH multisig.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Script-level reference for legacy multisig templates, stack evaluation, and spending conditions.
